comparison: DA3 teacher depth vs selected tilt target variants, using each variant's RGB warp when available
alignment: per-image median scaling on valid pixels
valid_pixels: variant mask > 0, target depth > 0, DA3 finite and positive

files.rgb_aug: Backward-compatible alias for the primary FOV augmented RGB.
files.rgb_aug_fov*: Augmented RGB after geometry tilt recomputed with the listed FOV.
files.depth_aug: Backward-compatible alias for the primary FOV geometry z-depth in meters.
files.depth_naive: Backward-compatible alias for the primary FOV naive warped depth.
files.depth_naive_fov*: Naive homography-warped depth recomputed with the listed FOV warp.
files.depth_geo_fov*: Geometry depth recomputed with the listed FOV warp.
files.alpha_fov*: Pixel-dependent geometry depth scale for the listed FOV.
files.mask_aug: Backward-compatible alias for the primary FOV valid-pixel mask.
files.mask_aug_fov*: Valid-pixel mask after inverse warp and geometry depth checks for the listed FOV.
files.debug: Backward-compatible alias for the primary FOV debug strip.
files.debug_fov*: Side-by-side original RGB, original depth, tilt RGB, naive depth, geometry depth, and valid mask for the listed FOV.
